name: Princess Anne Pawn & Jewelers
description_short: Princess Anne Pawn & Jewelers offers collateral-based cash loans from $5 to $50,000, gold/jewelry buying, and jewelry repair services in Virginia Beach since 1992.
description_long:
Princess Anne Pawn & Jewelers has operated in Virginia Beach since January 6, 1992, serving the Hampton Roads region including Norfolk and Chesapeake. The company is legally licensed, bonded, and insured to do business in Virginia, holds BBB A+ accreditation, and maintains memberships in the National Pawnbrokers Association and NFIB. They position themselves as a community-focused pawnbroker with emphasis on respectful customer service and fair lending practices.

The company offers cash loans ranging from $5 to $50,000 against collateral including jewelry, electronics, watches, firearms, musical instruments, and power tools. They buy gold, platinum, silver, diamonds, scrap gold, and coins outright. Their on-site jewelry repair service, operated by a jeweler with over 25 years of experience, handles broken jewelry restoration, ring sizing, and watch battery replacement. They also sell quality merchandise at below-retail prices and offer free professional jewelry cleaning.

Princess Anne Pawn emphasizes gold purchasing as their core strength, marketing themselves as specialists in broken gold jewelry, gold coins, bars, and entire collections. They claim to "loan more" and "pay more" than competitors, and highlight their in-store jewelry house as the only one in their area. The website repeatedly uses their tagline "Fast Friendly Cash When You Need It" and promotes a 20% discount for website mentions.

As a pawn shop, this company serves those needing immediate cash against personal valuables as an alternative to traditional lending, with particular strength in precious metals. The main caveat is that pawn loans require collateral surrender and carry implicit costs through the loan terms and buyback requirements, making them suitable primarily for those with valuable items and short-term cash needs rather than long-term credit solutions.
pros: BBB A+ accredited with 30+ years operating history since 1992
Loan range from $5 to $50,000 provides flexibility for various needs
On-site jewelry repair by jeweler with 25+ years experience
Free professional jewelry cleaning service included
Licensed, bonded, and insured in Virginia
Member of National Pawnbrokers Association, demonstrating industry standards compliance
Offers watch battery installation while-you-wait service
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering collateral, creating risk of permanent loss if unable to repay
No transparent APR or fee structure disclosed on website for loan terms
Limited geographic service area (Virginia Beach and Hampton Roads region only)
No online application or remote valuation process mentioned; requires in-person visit
Website last updated in 2018, suggesting potentially outdated business information
best_for: People with valuable jewelry, gold, or electronics needing immediate short-term cash
Individuals seeking to sell or liquidate jewelry, coins, or precious metals
Those needing jewelry repair services at below-retail prices
Borrowers with collateral who want to avoid credit checks or traditional lending
diagnosis: Princess Anne Pawn & Jewelers is best for consumers with valuable items (especially jewelry or gold) who need immediate cash and can afford short-term collateral-based lending. The main caveat is that pawn loans are not traditional credit products—they require surrendering items and carry implicit costs through loan terms, making them a last-resort cash solution rather than a credit-building or long-term financing tool.
services: Cash loans from $5 to $50,000 on collateral
Gold, platinum, and silver jewelry purchasing
Scrap gold and gold coin buying
Electronics buying (flat-screen TVs, iPads, iPods, laptops, cellular phones)
Retail merchandise sales at below-market prices
